text: Excellent course . If you want to learn the mathematical intuitions behind Lasso , Ridge and general ML concepts , this course breaks them down into details . This is the only course I ' ve found on the many MOOC sites out there that goes into this much depth . One downside is that Coursera lacks support in general , but I do not consider it downside of this course but Coursera ' s . In terms of frameworks , many people like me have completed the course using Numpy and Scikit - learn instead of Dato , so it is doable !
